mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pa_txn_leasing_requirement ( company_id, prospect_id, property_id, property_name, requirement_level, block_name, floor_name, preferred_unit_id, unit_type, bedrooms, area_from, area_to, budget_from, budget_to, move_in_date, lease_term_months, usage_type, parking_required, fit_out_required, special_requirements, notes, created_by ) VALUES ( #{companyId}, #{prospectId}, #{propertyId}, #{propertyName}, #{requirementLevel}, #{blockName}, #{floorName}, #{preferredUnitId}, #{unitType}, #{bedrooms}, #{areaFrom}, #{areaTo}, #{budgetFrom}, #{budgetTo}, #{moveInDate}, #{leaseTermMonths}, #{usageType}, #{parkingRequired}, #{fitOutRequired}, #{specialRequirements}, #{notes}, #{createdBy} ) SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM pa_txn_leasing_requirement WHERE prospect_id = #{prospectId} ORDER BY created_on DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE pa_txn_leasing_requirement SET company_id = #{companyId}, property_id = #{propertyId}, property_name = #{propertyName}, requirement_level = #{requirementLevel}, block_name = #{blockName}, floor_name = #{floorName}, preferred_unit_id = #{preferredUnitId}, unit_type = #{unitType}, bedrooms = #{bedrooms}, area_from = #{areaFrom}, area_to = #{areaTo}, budget_from = #{budgetFrom}, budget_to = #{budgetTo}, move_in_date = #{moveInDate}, lease_term_months = #{leaseTermMonths}, usage_type = #{usageType}, parking_required = #{parkingRequired}, fit_out_required = #{fitOutRequired}, special_requirements = #{specialRequirements}, notes = #{notes}, updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE id = #{id}
